title: Praise The Lord God in His Temple

verses.text: Praise the Lord God in his temple; Praise him in his firmament. Praise him for his acts of power; Praise him for his excellence.
Praise him with the sound of trumpets; Praise him with the harp and lute. Praise with tambourine and dancing; Praise him with the strings and flute.
Praise him with the clash of cymbals; With loud cymbals praise accord. All with life and breath now praise him. Hallelujah! Praise the Lord!
